parsing_res_list.block_content:
Parallel processing of products on the computer is facilitated by a variant of (3)for r computing $\mathbf{C}=\mathbf{A}\mathbf{B},$ which is used by standard algorithms (such as in Lapack).UI this method,A is used as given,B is taken in terms of its column vectors, and the product is computed columnwise; thus,(5)$\mathbf{A B}=\mathbf{A}[\mathbf{b}_{1}\quad\mathbf{b}_{2}\quad\cdots\quad\mathbf{b}_{p}]=[\mathbf{A b}_{1}\quad\mathbf{A b}_{2}\quad\cdots\quad\mathbf{A b}_{p}].$ 
Columns of B Baret then assigned to different 1processors (individually yorseveral to eachp processor),which simultaneously compute the columns of the product matrix $\mathbf{A}\mathbf{b}_{1},\mathbf{A}\mathbf{b}_{2},$ etc.
Advanced Engineering Mathematics, 10/e by Edwin Kreyszig Copyright 2011 by John Wiley & Sons. All rights reserved.

core_content.markdown:
Parallel processing of products on the computer is facilitated by a variant of (3)for r computing $\mathbf{C}=\mathbf{A}\mathbf{B},$ which is used by standard algorithms (such as in Lapack).UI this method,A is used as given,B is taken in terms of its column vectors, and the product is computed columnwise; thus,(5)$\mathbf{A B}=\mathbf{A}[\mathbf{b}_{1}\quad\mathbf{b}_{2}\quad\cdots\quad\mathbf{b}_{p}]=[\mathbf{A b}_{1}\quad\mathbf{A b}_{2}\quad\cdots\quad\mathbf{A b}_{p}].$ 

Columns of B Baret then assigned to different 1processors (individually yorseveral to eachp processor),which simultaneously compute the columns of the product matrix $\mathbf{A}\mathbf{b}_{1},\mathbf{A}\mathbf{b}_{2},$ etc.
